title: castilleja densiflora var. obispoensis
intro: Castilleja densiflora var. obispoensis, also known as the Purple Owl's Clover or Owl's Clover, is a rare and endangered subspecies of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Castilleja densiflora var. obispoensis are said to include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant and soothe coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
